initiatives.name: Boulder Food Rescue
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and food justice through just-in-time food rescue and redistribution in Boulder County. They coordinate food recovery by bike, no-cost grocery programs, and community-led food access initiatives while building power through participatory research, leadership development, and creating spaces for food system transformation.

initiatives.name: Rocky Mountain Peace and Justice Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through nonviolent action and education in Boulder. They coordinate peace initiatives, environmental justice campaigns, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, political education, and creating spaces for movement building and social change.

initiatives.name: Boulder Community Food Pantry
initiatives.description: Take what you need. Leave what you can. This pantry is all about helping in the fight for decentralized food access and providing care to our neighbors.

initiatives.name: Boulder Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: find us at the bandshell every saturday afternoon. DM to get involved

initiatives.name: Boulder SURJ
initiatives.description: Showing Up for Racial Justice in Boulder, CO. Through community organizing, mobilizing and education, BSURJ moves white people to act for justice.

initiatives.name: Boulder DSA
initiatives.description: Democratic Socialists of America | Boulder, CO

initiatives.name: Denver Boulder JVP
initiatives.description: Jews organizing in Colorado for Palestinian liberation and Judaism beyond Zionism.

initiatives.name: Food Security Network of Boulder & Broomfield Counties
initiatives.description: Advocating for food justice in Boulder & Broomfield Counties Colorado
